ValidationRule.description: Prevent user from changing agreement manager on agreement
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(AND( ISCHANGED(ConventionManager__c), OR( NOT($User.ProfileId = 'Carmignac - System Administrator'), NOT($User.ProfileId = 'Carmignac - Interface'), NOT($User.ProfileId = 'System Administrator') ), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false ),NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to change Agreement Manager of this record
